prestazioni: Engine: 4.0L MA1/70 flat-six (997 RSR-specific) with a custom Manthey Racing Stage 3+ build, featuring forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (94mm bore), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft with 80.4mm stroke for 4,000cc displacement. Compression ratio increased to 13.5:1 with custom JE piston domes and Total Seal gapless rings. Ported and polished cylinder heads with oversized titanium intake valves (42mm) and sodium-filled exhaust valves (36mm) by Schrick, paired with dual valve springs and titanium retainers. Custom camshafts by Kelford Cams (292° intake / 288° exhaust duration, 12.5mm lift) for optimized high-RPM power delivery (9,000 RPM redline).

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (86mm compressor wheel, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and Akrapovič 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system, tuned to 1.8 bar (26 psi) boost via a Motec M150 ECU with anti-lag and launch control. Custom intercooler by PWR Racing (dual-core, 1,200hp capacity) with a 100mm front-mount setup and dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps feeding ID1700x injectors (2,200cc/min).

Drivetrain & Suspension: Sequential 6-speed Holinger RD6 paddle-shift gearbox with a Sachs Racing twin-disc carbon clutch (240mm) and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock). Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with RSR-spec spherical bearing top mounts, adjustable anti-roll bars (24mm front / 22mm rear), and spherical bearing control arms. Brembo GT-R monoblock calipers (6-piston front / 4-piston rear) with 400mm front and 380mm rear carbon-ceramic rotors (PCCB) and Ferodo DS3000 brake pads. Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/650-R18 front, 325/705-R18 rear) on BBS FI-R 18x12.5J and 18x13J wheels.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full RSR 3.8/4.0 body kit by Manthey Racing, including a carbon fiber front splitter with integrated dive planes, a 991.2 GT3-spec rear diffuser with Gurney flap, and a fixed carbon fiber rear wing (RSR 4.0-spec, 1,800mm width) with adjustable angle of attack (0-12°). Carbon fiber hood with NACA ducts for intercooler airflow and side skirts with integrated brake cooling ducts. Custom front canards by 991Racing for increased downforce (250kg at 200km/h).

Exterior: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) in the "Stuttgart" style, featuring extended fenders (50mm front / 70mm rear) with riveted aluminum overfenders and custom carbon fiber side mirrors (991 GT3 RS-spec). Full PPF (XPEL Ultimate) with matte clear bra on high-impact areas. Custom livery by VINTA Racing, featuring a retro Gulf Oil-inspired scheme with modern carbon fiber weave accents and gold-painted BBS wheels (RWB-spec).

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage by Matter Racing (chromoly steel, 8-point with door bars) and Sparco Pro 2000 seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses. Custom carbon fiber dashboard by 991Racing with Motec C127 digital dash and Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel (RSR-spec, 360mm diameter). Fire suppression system by Lifeline (plumbed to engine bay and cockpit) and custom aluminum pedal box with adjustable brake bias. Full sound deadening removal for weight reduction (target: 1,150kg dry).
